title: Playful Planes
description: Throwable Paper Planes with a few surprises
body:
--- Throw a paper plane with a twist! Combine it with various items to create unique effects when thrown. ### Combinations & Effects - **Paper Plane + Fire Charge** - *Entity Hit*: Sets the entity on fire - *Block Hit*: Ignites the block - **Paper Plane + Potion** - *Entity Hit*: Applies the potion effect to the entity - *Block Hit*: Creates a lingering potion cloud - **Paper Plane + TNT** - *Entity Hit*: Deals explosive knock back to the entity - *Block Hit*: Creates a small explosion at the block ### Durability - The paper plane takes durability damage each time it is thrown. - Breaks after 32 throws. ### Enchantments - Can be enchanted with: *Unbreaking*, *Mending*, and *Loyalty*.
Crafting Recipes

Basic

Flammable

Potion

TNT

---
